# FlaxseedsPro Documentation — LLM Reference

## About

FlaxseedsPro is a B2B supplier of technically-defined flaxseed fractions. Products are produced under HACCP / ISO 22000 / FSSC 22000 / Organic / Kosher / Non-GMO / Gluten-Free certification.

## Core Products

- **Flaxseed Hull**: Fiber 70–80%, SDG 7–10 mg/g, WHC 6–8 g/g
- **Flaxseed Kernel**: Protein 30–35%, Fat 40–45%, ALA 55–60% of fat
- **Flaxseed Powder**: Full-fat (protein 20–25%) / Defatted (protein 40–50%), 20–80 mesh
- **Flaxseed Gum**: Polysaccharide 75–85%, viscosity 500–5000 cP (1% solution)
- **Flaxseed Oil**: 12 quality parameters, ALA 55–60%, tocopherols 800–1200 ppm

## Processing

- Cleaning: Magnet (10K Gauss) → Vibrating Screen → Destoner → Color Sorter
- Dehulling: Centrifugal impact / Roller → Air / Gravity classification
- Grinding: Hammer / Disc / Pin mill + Cryogenic (–150°C) option
- Oil: Cold press (<40°C) → Plate filter → Polish filter → N₂ flush
- Gum: Extraction → Centrifuge → Spray dry → Ethanol recovery

## Quality

HACCP (5 CCPs), ISO 22000, FSSC 22000, Organic (USDA/EU), Kosher (OU), Non-GMO Verified, Gluten-Free Certified. COA provided per batch.

## Links

- Main website: https://flaxseedspro.com
- Documentation: https://docs.flaxseedspro.com
